title: MACTING Christmas Red Holly Berry Stem Ornaments, 8 Pcs Large Branches/32 Pcs Twig Artificial Berry Stem, 17Inch Removable Berries Stems, Home Decorative for Christmas Tree Wreath…
features: 【8 Pack Artificial Glitter Berry Stem Ornaments】- Package includes 8 Christmas tree gold berry stems. Glitter Berry diameter approx. 0.3inch, stems length approx. 18cm/7inch. Each berry stem with 12 branches and there are 5 berries on each branch. You can use the Christmas glitter artificial berries match to decorate your party, home, wedding, holiday, the perfect size and bright color makes your places more vivid.

【Vivid & Lifelike Design】- The Christmas glitter berries stems ornaments with bright colors, all the artificial berries looks like lifelike, bright and attractive. Glitter artificial berries stems adding a focal point to your Christmas tree decorations ornaments and other decorations, and create a strong festive atmosphere. Please Note: The glitter powder may drop when you unpack the package or use them.

【Durable & Bendable】- These Christmas gold artificial berry twig glitter sticks are made of foam balls and fishing wire, each ball with glitter. They are durable and light-weight, so you can bend it to any shape you need. Glitter berries can be used with Christmas balls and flower toghther, to add bright colors to your Christmas party.

【DIY Christmas Decoration】- The glitter artificial berry decorations for Christmas tree are very suitable for Christmas indoor and outdoor decorations, adding a pop of color for your Christmas party. These berries picks are also suitable for DIY hand -made, and can make handicrafts with your friends and family. Giving full play to your imagination can bring you a lot of fun and joy.

【Christmas Decorations & Gifts】- These dazzling glitter picks is a good ideal for wreath, flower arrangement, vases fillers, dinner table, gift boxes, Christmas wall rack, Christmas tree decorations. You can also give it as Christmas gift to your family, friends, colleagues, neighbors, I believe they will like glitter artificial berries full of festive atmosphere.
